params.name: Wuthering Heights
params.description: Wuthering Heights is Emily's only novel, which, unlike her sister Charlotte's Jane Eyre, features a unique narrative structure and intense emotional conflicts. It tells the story of the generations-long feud between the Earnshaw and Linton families in the remote and desolate Yorkshire moors. The protagonist, Heathcliff, is adopted by the Earnshaw family as a child and develops a tortuous and painful love tragedy with Catherine Earnshaw. Through Wuthering Heights, Emily presents the complexity an …
